description: IPC version change mapping between 2025.01 and 2026.01. Contains 1,193 entries tracking symbol changes (created, deleted, modified) across IPC editions. Use this to map deprecated IPC codes in older patent data to their current equivalents.

columns.name: from_symbol
columns.description: Source IPC symbol in canonical 14-character format (from the previous IPC version).

columns.name: from_symbol_patstat
columns.description: Source symbol in PATSTAT spacing format. JOIN key to tls209_appln_ipc.ipc_class_symbol for finding patents using the old code.

columns.name: to_symbol
columns.description: Target IPC symbol in canonical 14-character format (in the new IPC version).

columns.name: to_symbol_patstat
columns.description: Target symbol in PATSTAT spacing format. JOIN key to tls_ipc_hierarchy.symbol_patstat.

columns.name: from_version
columns.description: IPC edition date of the source symbol (e.g., '20250101').

columns.name: to_version
columns.description: IPC edition date of the target symbol (e.g., '20260101').

columns.name: modification
columns.description: Type of change: 'c'=created (new symbol), 'd'=deleted (symbol removed), 'm'=modified (symbol changed scope).

columns.name: default_reclassification
columns.description: Whether this mapping is the default reclassification path: 'Y'=yes (use this mapping by default), 'N'=no (alternative mapping).

columns.name: revision_project
columns.description: WIPO IPC revision project code responsible for this change (e.g., 'C519', 'F140').
